title: Point get plan got error: runtime error: index out of range [-1]
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
create table t (id int unique key, c int);
insert into t values (1, 10);
insert into t values (2, 20);
insert into t values (3, 30);
select _tidb_rowid from t where id in (1, 2, 3);
```

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

```sql
+-------------+                                                                             
| _tidb_rowid |                                                                             
+-------------+                                                                             
|           1 |                                                                             
|           2 |                                                                             
|           3 |                                                                             
+-------------+   
```


### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```sql
ERROR 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [-1]
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, c VARCHAR(255));
SELECT ROWID FROM t1 WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);
key_bug_features: select _tidb_rowid with index out of range
